instructions: Kalita Wave recipe optimized for honey-process coffees. The flat-bottomed dripper provides the even, gentle extraction that honey-processed beans need to express their characteristic sweetness without muddiness. Medium-fine grind and 93C water balance extraction of the mucilage-derived sugars. Extended 35-second bloom ensures even saturation of the sticky honey-process bean structure. Two steady pours in concentric circles maintain consistent bed temperature. Produces a clean, honey-sweet cup with stone fruit acidity.
